illustrations.prompt: Maya at her bedroom workshop. Cluttered wooden workbench with circuit boards, tools, wires. Warm golden desk lamp lighting. Notebooks and blueprints scattered. Cozy creative inventor den.
Dark basement corridor with rough concrete walls and exposed pipes overhead. Single flashlight beam cutting through dust and cobwebs. Eerie mysterious atmosphere. No people.
Maya discovering abandoned underground lab. Dusty workbenches with old equipment. Grey crates with faded labels. Cobwebs. Flashlight piercing darkness. Forgotten secrets.

scene_spotlights.quote: Every project was a tiny universe of possibility.
Whatever you are, you're coming with me.
The cube heard it. And began to boot.
He was ALIVE. Really, truly, impossibly ALIVE.
A pulse of CYAN light shot out of Blip like a ripple in water.
Someone woke up the little cube. How... INTERESTING.
Her goggles were foggy. Her fingers were scorched. Her grin was VICTORIOUS.
Reckless love is still love, Maya-beta.
Like a platformer, except the consequences were REAL.
Version 2.0. And still himself. Still Blip.
The sky is NEVER the same color twice.
The Gridlord wasn't the villain. They were the ALARM.
Glitch Squad - we have a rescue mission.
